---
name: coach
description: Strategic signal coaching session using GROW protocol with scorecard, positioning check, accountability, signal-gap scan, commitment, and debrief.
---

# Coach Signal

Run a structured strategic signal coaching session.

## Instructions

- Parse `$ARGUMENTS`: signal → run GROW-based signal protocol
- Step 1 SCORECARD: capture 1:1 count, tech ratio, online signals, follow-ups, active streams — required before proceeding
- Step 2 POSITIONING: read active streams, ask per-person positioning question, flag tech_ratio > 0.8 or 3+ streams
- Step 3 ACCOUNTABILITY: surface previous signal commitment from 06-coaching/daily/; ask what happened
- Step 4 SIGNAL-GAP SCAN: read 03-projects/*/01-*.md, suggest 2-3 signals tagged strategic/operational
- Step 5 COMMIT: one action (person or post) + deadline — required before debrief
- Step 6 DEBRIEF+PERSIST: capture recent 1:1s, write signal: frontmatter + ## Signal Session to coaching log
